ham.subject: Your Amazon Order has Shipped - Order #123-4567890-1234567
ham.body:
Hello,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon.com.

Your order #123-4567890-1234567 has shipped via Amazon Logistics.

Estimated delivery: 5-7 business days.

Items:
- 1x Echo Dot (4th Gen) – 12000 INR
- 1x Kindle Paperwhite – 4800 INR

Tracking number: <URL>

If you have any questions, reply to this email or visit your order details page.

Best regards,
Amazon Customer Service Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Salary Payment Pending - Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Employee,

This is a formal notice from the HR Department.

Your salary for the month of March is pending due to an incomplete verification process. Please submit the required documents at the earliest to avoid a delay in your payment.

Steps to complete:
1. Verify your bank account details: <URL>
2. Upload the latest bank statement: <URL>

Please note: Failure to comply within 48 hours may result in a deduction from your next payroll.

HR Manager - [Name]
HR Department, XYZ Pvt Ltd.

Thank you for your immediate attention.

Best regards,
HR Team
